{{Quote|The GAG thought they had all the best kit, but she had a few devices that could get past them, using older technology, frequencies, and relays they'd never spot. A surveillance system using technology wasn't looking for devices almost as basic as a code flashed with a piece of broken mirror. Tech could be blind.|Mara musing about the transponder's efficiency|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref>}}
A '''hyperspace transponder''' was a device that allowed messages to be sent through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Characteristics==
Hyperspace transponders varied in size, with at least some transponders being small enough that they became handheld devices. Additionally, hyperspace transponders varied in reliability and quality, with standard transponders not always being reliable in sending messages. Military grade transponders were much more reliable, and were used in in military [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacons]].<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

==History==
[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] used at least two hyperspace transponders in her lifetime; one she used as a [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] during her time as [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] (this transponder was hidden in a [[Ben Skywalker's vibroblade|vibroblade]] that she bequeathed to her [[Ben Skywalker|son]] and was promptly utilized as a tracking device afterward) and the other she used to track [[Lumiya]] after their vicious [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] on the moon of [[Hesperidium/Legends|Hesperidium]].

{{Tech-stub}}
